narrative: Progress toward a US-Iran ceasefire dominates the weekend tape, fueling a record-high equity run and cooling safe-haven USD demand. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1659; easing geopolitical friction and a +169bp OIS carry advantage for USD is likely to keep the pair capped at the open. USD/JPY closed Friday at 159.25; while risk-on sentiment would typically support the pair, fading Fed hike bets and a strong JPY CESI (+12) set up downside risk for the Tokyo open. BoC's June 10 meeting is the next key focus.
